title: Columns, Single Select
excerpt:
Hello Monday Community, 
We are trying to make our dropdown a single select, however, it says it “couldn’t update column setting, please try again.” Any idea why that error message keeps popping up when? 
Thanks, 
Jared

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday Community,

We are trying to make our dropdown a single select, however, it says it “couldn’t update column setting, please try again.” Any idea why that error message keeps popping up when?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jared,

Thanks for flagging this and sorry to hear you are experiencing this issue!

To confirm, you’re still unable to set the option?

image (155)834×618 23.1 KB

If you can please try in an incognito window this would be helpful just so we can rule out any caching issues

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yeah, so, It started working all of a sudden. Not sure why, but I’m not going to complain!

Thank you.
